title: Bulk Add Users to account
excerpt: The idea is to be able to add users in bulk to the monday.com account. For example with a csv file. Perhaps have a template csv file  to download. Modify that with the user’s to be added and their role (guest, member, vi…

posts.author: agrossman (Anya  Grossman)
posts.cookedHtml:
The idea is to be able to add users in bulk to the monday.com account. For example with a csv file. Perhaps have a template csv file to download. Modify that with the user’s to be added and their role (guest, member, viewer) and then upload that into monday.com to be able to be added in bulk.

Since the current option is to add users one by one individually.
